name: brex
description: Reads and writes Brex transactions, users, expenses, vendors, budgets, cards, accounts, statements, transfers, and webhooks through the Brex platform REST API.

risk.read: external Brex API read of card transaction, user, expense, vendor, card, account, and transfer data
risk.write: external mutation of vendors, org directory (departments/locations/titles/users), card controls/lifecycle, expenses, and webhooks; card lock/unlock/terminate take effect on real payment instruments immediately
risk.approval: required for all write actions; each action's per-record risk string in writes.json is the authoritative summary
